characters.name: A.P. Gibralter
characters.description: A.P. GibralterInformationGender:MaleLikes:NoveltiesDictionErotic Sci-Fi FantasyDislikes:CorruptionEvil DoingBible SalesmenFirst Appearance:BirthVoiced By:Vernon Chatman A.P. Gibralteris the newsmaster general of Wonder Showzen. He is a large, red, multi-eyed creature. His head is rectangular and he has long arms and short legs. He gives it to us straight and hard. He has at least one segment per episode, and he starts each one with "breaking news at this hour". He also has a daughter namedLashequa May. Whatta tool.

characters.name: Aggression
characters.description: AggressionInformationGender:MaleDislikes:NerdsWordsworthFirst Appearance:ScienceVoiced By:Vernon Chatman Aggressionis the pure physical manifestation ofWordsworth's anger. His body is covered in long black hair and has two muscular human arms. He has two red eyes and a flap mouth.

characters.name: Alana
characters.description: AlanaInformationGender:FemaleLikes:AnimalsThe TruthDislikes:GovernmentGrandpaFirst Appearance:NatureVoiced By:Alana Peterson Alanais a reporter on Beat Kids. She interviewed the director of the Animal Farm petting zoo, asking him about the animals, and trying to find out what torture he puts them through.

characters.name: Alex
characters.description: AlexInformationGender:FemaleFirst Appearance:SpaceVoiced By:Alex de Castro Alexis a child on Wonder Showzen. She is in a total of ten episodes. She first appears during the Q&A on what is heaven, with the answer "that's where my legs are, keep kickin' angels boys".

characters.name: Ant
characters.description: AntInformationGender:MaleLikes:Second ChancesLiving LifeFirst Appearance:PatienceVoiced By:Sam Seder The Antis a small insect. A boy was spitting loogies into an ant hill, killing him. However, the cartoon went into reverse and the ant was given a second chance at life. With his second chance, he decided to sit on his reclining chair and watch Wonder Showzen.

characters.name: Arthur
characters.description: ArthurInformationGender:MaleFirst Appearance:Kids ShowVoiced By:Vernon Chatman Arthuris the prototype version ofClarence. He is a darker blue than Clarence, his eyes are farther apart, his pupils are smaller, and he has shorter arms. Despite the differences, he still has his signature high-pitched annoying voice.

characters.name: Auden
characters.description: AudenInformationGender:MaleLikes:Topless BarsMac n' CheeseFirst Appearance:BodyVoiced By:Auden Galbraith Audenis a child on Wonder Showzen. He is in a total of four episodes. He first appears during the Q&A on what is a hero, with the answer "isn't that short for Hiroshima" (referring to the nuclear bombing on Hiroshima in 1945).

characters.name: Aunt Flo
characters.description: Aunt FloInformationGender:FemaleFirst Appearance:BodyVoiced By:Vernon Chatman Aunt Flois the personification of menstruation. She is a red woman who emerges from a little girl's menstrual blood, during her first period, She explains to the girl about becoming a woman and takes the girl inside her "womanhood" to show her what happens during menstruation. She has blue eyes with bags, a leer on her face, a bun and a red dress with white trim and short sleeves. She has gold loop earrings and a beauty mark on the side. She also has a deep, gravelly voice.

characters.name: Baby at Sea
characters.description: Baby at SeaInformationGender:FemaleFirst Appearance:Ocean The Baby at Seais a lost baby stranded in the ocean. She is first seen when the puppets wander into the stormy region near the island of liquid imagination. She floats across the screen on an inner tube, then is shocked by lightning, becoming an adult-sized skeleton.

characters.description: Baby KramdarInformationGender:MaleFirst Appearance:Time Baby Kramdaris our new Lord and Messiah. While looking through a dump,Chaunceyfound an abandoned baby, which later became his lunch at a Chinese restaurant.

characters.name: Baby Mank
characters.description: Baby MankInformationGender:MaleLikes:JusticeDislikes:CrimeFirst Appearance:Justice Baby Mankis the child ofHe-Bro. He was created when He-Bro uttered the lacerating wordplay, "go on, run away, like a little baby", then shot a baby out of his muscles. He is a muscle baby raised on man milk, commonly known as MANK.

characters.description: Baby PervisInformationGender:MaleLikes:WomenJesusDislikes:ReadingFirst Appearance:MathematicsVoiced By:Alex Kilgore Baby Pervisis an actor on Horse Apples. He wears a white "My First Proud to be American" muscle shirt, blue jeans, and brown cowboy boots. His light brown hair is styled into a mullet with long sideburns, and he has a light moustache and beard.

characters.name: Boogie Noogie Bunch
characters.description: Boogie Noogie BunchInformationGender:Males, FemalesLikes:ShuggieFirst Appearance:DiversityVoiced By:John LeeAlyson LevyVernon Chatman The Boogie Noogie Bunchis a parody of the Care Bears. They consist of Happy Boogie, Grumpy Boogie, Baby Boogie, Poopie Boogie and Urban Boogie. They like to snuggle clouds, give hugs and munch on cookies, but they especially love to Shuggie.
